_comment: Site registry for LTRisk pilot assets. Add new sites here before pulling data.
_model_note: open_meteo_model must be a valid Open-Meteo Climate API model name. Confirmed working: EC_Earth3P_HR, NICAM16_8S, FGOALS_f3_H, HiRAM_SIT_HR. MRI_ESM2_0 / MPI_ESM1_2_HR are NOT valid on this API.

hayhurst_solar.name: Hayhurst Texas Solar
hayhurst_solar.notes: West Texas high desert. High UV, extreme temperature swings, low humidity, frequent dust. Primary solar pilot site.

maverick_wind.name: Maverick Creek Wind
maverick_wind.notes: Central Texas semi-arid. Moderate icing risk, variable winds, mixed freeze events (cf. Texas 2021). Primary wind pilot site.
